name: Consented flow avatar minting group tokens (isPermittedFlow bug)
description: Bug reproduction: Consented flow avatar sends tokens to mint group tokens. Before fix, ValidateConsentedFlow ran BEFORE InsertRouterInTransfers, causing Avatar→Group edges to be filtered (consented flow check failed because Avatar doesn't directly trust Group). After fix, InsertRouterInTransfers runs first, creating Avatar→Router→Group edges which bypass consent validation. This caused 'isPermittedFlow' failures on-chain.
